pinterest.text: What if 10 minutes of maze-solving changed their whole focus? Picture their little face absorbed, quiet, and engaged. For the parent who wants screen time to actually mean something, more activities like this at joymaze.com

instagram.text:
45 minutes of coloring reduces cortisol — the stress hormone — in children. Even if they don't think they're creative.
You don't have to be artistic. The physiological shift happens regardless.
That coloring page you printed last Tuesday wasn't busywork. It was regulation.
Save this for the next time someone tells you screen-free activities are 'just play.'
More like this at joymaze.com — link in bio.
